channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed

item.title: Tyra Banks is celebrating the “Modelland” revival with new f…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Tyra Banks is celebrating the “Modelland” revival with new flavors at her Sydney ice cream shops, SMiZE & DREAM.

Happy anniversary to all those who celebrate.

🔊 youtu.be/cSDd_aQjm54?...
item.content:encoded:
Tyra Banks is celebrating the “Modelland” revival with new flavors at her Sydney ice cream shops, SMiZE & DREAM.

Happy anniversary to all those who celebrate.

🔊 youtu.be/cSDd_aQjm54?...

item.title: The internet recently discovered “Modelland,” a song Tyra Ba…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
The internet recently discovered “Modelland,” a song Tyra Banks unveiled 15 years ago today. Newfound fascination with the theme to her 576-page fantasy novel has propelled its “‘Harry Potter’ meets ‘America’s Next Top Model’” universe into the public consciousness…

🔊 youtu.be/cSDd_aQjm54?...
item.content:encoded:
The internet recently discovered “Modelland,” a song Tyra Banks unveiled 15 years ago today. Newfound fascination with the theme to her 576-page fantasy novel has propelled its “‘Harry Potter’ meets ‘America’s Next Top Model’” universe into the public consciousness…

🔊 youtu.be/cSDd_aQjm54?...

item.title: Republicans passed a more than $1-trillion Pentagon bill alo…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Republicans passed a more than $1-trillion Pentagon bill alongside a budget blueprint that would let them bypass Democrats and unlock other funds for the Iran war and Trump's election overhaul bill. n.pr/4pxoW2e
item.content:encoded: Republicans passed a more than $1-trillion Pentagon bill alongside a budget blueprint that would let them bypass Democrats and unlock other funds for the Iran war and Trump's election overhaul bill. n.pr/4pxoW2e

item.title: The agreement gives American companies priority access to nu…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The agreement gives American companies priority access to nuclear reactors and fuel to Saudi Arabia. It's expected to last decades and be worth billions of dollars. n.pr/4bHQPPp
item.content:encoded: The agreement gives American companies priority access to nuclear reactors and fuel to Saudi Arabia. It's expected to last decades and be worth billions of dollars. n.pr/4bHQPPp

item.title: Charli XCX’s ‘Music, Fashion, Film’ is out on Friday, but "I…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
Charli XCX’s ‘Music, Fashion, Film’ is out on Friday, but "If You Take Away The Music, Then What Has She Got?" won’t be on it.

It’s one of the b-sides from her $125 box set.
item.content:encoded:
Charli XCX’s ‘Music, Fashion, Film’ is out on Friday, but "If You Take Away The Music, Then What Has She Got?" won’t be on it.

It’s one of the b-sides from her $125 box set.

item.title: One album. Two performances. Twenty years apart. We caught u…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)

item.title: Rolling Stone obtained CDC meeting notes highlighting how Ja…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Rolling Stone obtained CDC meeting notes highlighting how Jay Bhattacharya created a crisis at the agency by having Americans detained in response to the Ebola outbreak.

One CDC employee called it a “wild misuse” of power.

www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...
item.content:encoded:
Rolling Stone obtained CDC meeting notes highlighting how Jay Bhattacharya created a crisis at the agency by having Americans detained in response to the Ebola outbreak.

One CDC employee called it a “wild misuse” of power.

www.rollingstone.com/politics/pol...

item.title: For more than a decade, there's been something fishy going o…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: For more than a decade, there's been something fishy going on in a lake that straddles Vermont and the province of Quebec. It involves cancer, a kind of catfish, and — possibly — clues about how tumors metastasize. n.pr/4vLzcpb
item.content:encoded: For more than a decade, there's been something fishy going on in a lake that straddles Vermont and the province of Quebec. It involves cancer, a kind of catfish, and — possibly — clues about how tumors metastasize. n.pr/4vLzcpb

item.title: Plastic surgery is becoming so normalized and undetectable, …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Plastic surgery is becoming so normalized and undetectable, it's changing our relationship to reality. The New Yorker staff writer Jia Tolentino considers how beauty standards have dovetailed with AI. n.pr/4yB1bKO
item.content:encoded: Plastic surgery is becoming so normalized and undetectable, it's changing our relationship to reality. The New Yorker staff writer Jia Tolentino considers how beauty standards have dovetailed with AI. n.pr/4yB1bKO

item.title: R&B great Victoria Monét has announced her long-awaited new …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
R&B great Victoria Monét has announced her long-awaited new album 'Frequency Of Love.’

Check out a hypnotic video for the excellent single "Reach Out.”
item.content:encoded:
R&B great Victoria Monét has announced her long-awaited new album 'Frequency Of Love.’

Check out a hypnotic video for the excellent single "Reach Out.”

item.title: Remembering Ozzy Osbourne, the Prince of Darkness, whose leg…
item.author: Discogs (@discogsofficial.bsky.social)

item.title: Arthur Brun was living two separate lives. During the day, h…
item.author: Rolling Stone (@rollingstone.com)
item.description:
Arthur Brun was living two separate lives. During the day, he was a suburban dad and County Council member. But at night, he was participating in the largest drug-smuggling operation on Kauai.

Read about the Hawaii politician’s double life: apple.news/AjHvw00vMRu-...
item.content:encoded:
Arthur Brun was living two separate lives. During the day, he was a suburban dad and County Council member. But at night, he was participating in the largest drug-smuggling operation on Kauai.

Read about the Hawaii politician’s double life: apple.news/AjHvw00vMRu-...

item.title: It's not just watching paint dry. The twists and turns of th…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: It's not just watching paint dry. The twists and turns of the Reflecting Pool repairs, originally a two-week project, have kept bloggers and viewers busy all summer. n.pr/44KIOW9
item.content:encoded: It's not just watching paint dry. The twists and turns of the Reflecting Pool repairs, originally a two-week project, have kept bloggers and viewers busy all summer. n.pr/44KIOW9

item.title: Since resigning as NSO Artistic Advisor over Donald Trump’s …
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Since resigning as NSO Artistic Advisor over Donald Trump’s Kennedy Center takeover, Ben Folds has advocated for the federal arts institution, which he says is in trouble. Yesterday, he testified before a congressional forum and described how the president’s overhaul has undermined the Center.
item.content:encoded: Since resigning as NSO Artistic Advisor over Donald Trump’s Kennedy Center takeover, Ben Folds has advocated for the federal arts institution, which he says is in trouble. Yesterday, he testified before a congressional forum and described how the president’s overhaul has undermined the Center.

item.title: Protomartyr announced their new album 'Hotel Usona.’ Hear t…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:

Hear the churning single "Sounds We Cannot Hear":
item.content:encoded:
Protomartyr announced their new album 'Hotel Usona.’

Hear the churning single "Sounds We Cannot Hear":

item.title: The clangy, ruminative Boston DIY indie trio Krill formed in…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description:
The clangy, ruminative Boston DIY indie trio Krill formed in 2010, released three albums, and helped inspire a wave of peers.

After breaking up in 2015, all three members reunited to form Knot, releasing a self-titled album in 2020.

Now, they’ve shared their first new song as Krill in a decade.
item.content:encoded:
The clangy, ruminative Boston DIY indie trio Krill formed in 2010, released three albums, and helped inspire a wave of peers.

After breaking up in 2015, all three members reunited to form Knot, releasing a self-titled album in 2020.

Now, they’ve shared their first new song as Krill in a decade.

item.title: JUST IN: An independent autopsy of the body of Nolan Wells s…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: JUST IN: An independent autopsy of the body of Nolan Wells shows that the cause of death is undetermined pending an investigation, according to attorney Ben Crump.
item.content:encoded: JUST IN: An independent autopsy of the body of Nolan Wells shows that the cause of death is undetermined pending an investigation, according to attorney Ben Crump.

item.title: The El Niño weather pattern could limit how many Atlantic st…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The El Niño weather pattern could limit how many Atlantic storms form this year. But unusually warm waters temperatures mean the risk of destructive storms is still high. n.pr/3TeS0Q7
item.content:encoded: The El Niño weather pattern could limit how many Atlantic storms form this year. But unusually warm waters temperatures mean the risk of destructive storms is still high. n.pr/3TeS0Q7

item.title: The Neil Young tribute-album series 'Heart Of Gold' announce…
item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: The Neil Young tribute-album series 'Heart Of Gold' announced two more installments, featuring MJ Lenderman, Kurt Vile, Ben Gibbard, and more. Hear two new advance tracks…
item.content:encoded: The Neil Young tribute-album series 'Heart Of Gold' announced two more installments, featuring MJ Lenderman, Kurt Vile, Ben Gibbard, and more. Hear two new advance tracks…
